query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, imageUrl, bio, performerType) VALUES
('Angela White', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/JgumZmndeKwMEGtV.png', 'Highly acclaimed Australian performer, multiple award winner', 'Legend'),
('Anna Claire Clouds', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/KRJvluClyzuDCjCW.png', 'Rising star from Nashville, Tennessee', 'Rising Star'),
('Violet Myers', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/DNoDVHLCiEuxiNtN.png', 'Los Angeles based performer of Mexican heritage', 'Rising Star'),
('Abella Danger', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/tVgpwEjydFvtulWH.png', 'Ukrainian descent, former ballet dancer, multiple awards', 'Legend'),
('Riley Reid', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/HmUdExodhLMNJBwj.png', 'AVN Female Performer of the Year 2017, mixed heritage', 'Legend'),
('Lana Rhoades', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/wbPiknRHVsjqwvca.png', 'Extremely popular performer from Illinois', 'Legend'),
('Cherie DeVille', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/CMEZrWfzHHjrSiEM.png', 'French-Canadian descent, former physical therapist', 'MILF'),
('Kenna James', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/uOJQgFxrtTNczByo.png', 'Indiana native with girl-next-door charm', 'Girl Next Door'),
('Lauren Phillips', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/sWAqKMtuitBtKVdm.png', 'Tall redhead from New Jersey, multiple heritage', 'MILF'),
('Gianna Dior', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/fvbNAdAqrTbfnLMX.png', 'Alabama native, 2020 award winner', 'Rising Star'),
('Blake Blossom', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/fSrMzgdUCXCbyWjN.png', 'Arizona born performer', 'Rising Star'),
('Leana Lovings', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/usdxAMlulPXKkIYv.png', 'Florida native performer', 'Rising Star'),
('Octavia Red', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/FogrOEhFoKACqCxx.png', 'California based redhead performer', 'Rising Star'),
('Willow Ryder', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/IYgFVNShSTfYjkIJ.png', 'Tennessee native performer', 'Rising Star'),
('Kendra Lust', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/OCnliWBrFiTODaRE.png', 'Italian/French Canadian descent, former nurse, XBIZ Award winner', 'MILF'),
('Mia Malkova', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/rtYLBPpHONjAlsGK.png', 'California native, multiple awards, highly popular', 'Legend'),
('Adriana Chechik', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/ymDTHPtuOXfjLkNX.png', 'Serbian/Russian/English descent, AVN awards, Twitch streamer', 'Legend'),
('Cherry Kiss', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/iYBzXPzcZHVYoAdB.png', 'Serbian performer, XBIZ Europa Female Performer 2024', 'Legend');
